From: carol.nguyen@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: director.it-projects@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca; finance-review@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: ACTION REQUIRED: GC-Cloud Wave 4 — Budget Revision Request
Date: Tue, 3 Mar 2026 14:22:08 -0500

Director Okafor,

I am writing to formally request approval for a budget revision to the
GC-Cloud Wave 4 migration project (Project ID: GCCLOUD-W4-2026).

Background:
Following the infrastructure assessment completed on February 25, our
technical team has identified that the original cost estimate did not
account for legacy middleware remediation required before workload
migration. The remediation effort adds approximately $340,000 to the
projected cost, bringing the revised total to $2,740,000 (original
approved budget: $2,400,000).

The remediation is non-optional — without it, we risk data integrity
failures during the cloud migration cutover, which would trigger a
mandatory rollback and further delay the Q3 2026 target.

Action Required:
1. Please review and approve the attached Revised Budget Proposal
   (GC-Cloud-W4-Budget-Rev2.pdf) by March 10, 2026 so we can proceed
   with the Treasury Board amendment request.

2. Once approved, our team will submit the updated Business Case and
   amended project charter to Treasury Board Secretariat no later than
   March 15, 2026.

I am available for a call this week to discuss. Please advise on your
availability.

Respectfully,
Carol Nguyen, PMP
Project Manager, Cloud Migration Portfolio
Shared Services Canada
carol.nguyen@ssc-spc.gc.ca | 613-555-0247
